components.value: V, F (small wooden replica of an archery target)

description.value: You gain temporary, intuitive insight into the immediate future during your next attack. Your next single attack roll (if it is made before the end of the next round) gains a +20 insight bonus. Additionally, you are not affected by the miss chance that applies to attackers trying to strike a concealed target. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook.
